MOTION Notice Of Hearing And Motion To Discharge Receiver; Et Al
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
COURT CALL APPEARANCES:
Eugene Kazuo Yamamoto, Esq., 510/433-9340, for plaintiff Washington Mutual Bank, FA moving to discharge receiver, to approve receiver's final accounting, approve distribution of remaining receivership funds, exonerate bond and dismiss this case.
No appearance by defendant. Tentative ruling adopted -- PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK, FA MOTION To Discharge Receiver, Et Al. -- granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (JJM/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR 7855

Order To Show Cause Why Receiver Should Not Be Confirmed And Preliminary Injunction Issued
Off Calendar Aug-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Eugene K. Yamamoto, Esq. 510/433-9340 for Plaintiff and moving for appointment of a receiver and petitioning for a preliminary injunction
* Tentative ruling adopted -- Plaintiff's ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY RECEIVER SHOULD NOT BE CONFIRMED AND FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION -- Grant motion for preliminary injunction. Receiver confirmed. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II (301/) Joyce Long, CSR 8620
